[30;1m183 | [0m[35m- `stickyOffset` and `stickyHeader` now you can make your header sticky by following this [examples][0m

[30;1m185 | [0m[35m- `headerLabelGroupHeight` and `headerLabelHeight` now you can pass a `height` prop to both `CustomH[0m
[30;1m186 | [0m[35m- `headerLabelFormats` and `subHeaderLabelFormats` not you can pass `formatLabel` function to `DateH[0m
[30;1m187 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m188 | [0m[35m## 0.23.1[0m
[30;1m189 | [0m[35m[0m

[30;1m390 | [0m[35m| `canvasTimeEnd`    | `number` | denotes the end time in ms of the canvas timeline    |[0m
[30;1m391 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m392 | [0m[35m* `itemContext`[0m
